description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a rectangular footprint and a spacious rooftop terrace. The exterior is clad in a uniform, light brown material, likely concrete or stucco, with large windows distributed asymmetrically along the facade. A prominent feature is the rooftop swimming pool, which is enclosed by glass railings and situated at one end of the house. The house includes multiple outdoor seating areas and open spaces, with railings providing safety and clear separation between zones. The main entryway is recessed and centrally located, flanked by windows and accessible from a flat, open area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic typical of contemporary urban residences.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a rooftop pool, large windows, and open terraces, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the rooftop pool area on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the rooftop terrace and the pool area at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, rooftop amenities, and multiple window placements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool and adjacent terrace, with the entryway less visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed central entryway with flat approach, flanked by windows and minimal decorative elements
